name: mg-plugins
description: Code intelligence, quality guardrails, documentation tools, and protocol routing

plugins.name: ai-quality-guardrails
plugins.description: Quality guardrails for AI-assisted development: TDD enforcement, iterative review loops, AI code scrutiny, spec-driven planning, and self-review patterns.

plugins.name: codegraph
plugins.description: Code intelligence plugin — call-chain analysis, blast radius, dependency graph queries, and codebase briefings via MCP. Hybrid indexing with Tree-sitter + TypeScript LanguageService.

plugins.name: kdoc
plugins.description: Knowledge documentation toolkit — scaffold, maintain, and govern project documentation structures

plugins.name: router-plugin
plugins.description: Protocol pack — certify and scaffold router contracts for inter-agent communication
